action_set_definitions.name: get_site_context
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current location and meteorological data (temperature, wind, precipitation) to determine inspection feasibility.

action_set_definitions.name: get_inspection_checklist
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current status of all compliance categories in the inspection checklist.

action_set_definitions.name: analyze_facade_material
action_set_definitions.description: Analyzes the physical material of the current facade to determine emissivity and reflection-compensation settings.

zone.description: The specific area of the facade to analyze.

action_set_definitions.name: perform_thermal_scan
action_set_definitions.description: Executes a thermal imaging scan using specific calibration parameters to identify anomalies.

emissivity_setting.description: The setting used to compensate for material properties.

strategy.description: The scanning mode chosen based on material analysis.

action_set_definitions.name: log_defect_violation
action_set_definitions.description: Logs a specific defect into the site record, including categorization based on thermal data.

category.description: Classification (e.g., Insulation Gap, Moisture Ingress, Thermal Bridge).

action_set_definitions.name: update_checklist_status
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the status of a specific checklist category and recalculates the site integrity score.

category.description: The name of the checklist category to update.

status.description: The new status based on scan results.

state_description.current_location: The specific room, floor, or zone where the inspector is currently located.
state_description.inspection_checklist: A map of compliance categories (e.g., Fire Safety, Structural, Electrical) and their current status (Pending/Pass/Fail).
state_description.discovered_violations: A list of specific safety violations or non-compliance issues identified during the inspection.
state_description.environmental_conditions: Dynamic conditions of the building site such as lighting levels, occupancy, or ongoing construction activities.
state_description.elapsed_time_minutes: The total time spent on the inspection so far.
state_description.site_integrity_score: A numerical value from 0 to 100 representing the overall compliance level of the building.
